item.text: I’m going to locate every `AuditSink::emit` implementation in the repo using `rg`/`git grep`, then read each implementation with focused `sed -n` to classify specifically how `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` is handled.
I found the core trait and likely implementors; next I’m narrowing strictly to production Rust files under `crates/` and then reading each `emit` body to map it to the required canonical labels.
I’ve read all four known implementors and now I’m doing one verification pass for any additional `AuditSink::emit` implementations in `crates/` so we don’t miss edge cases.
